title: So Red the Rose
writer: Laurence Stallings, Maxwell Anderson, Edwin Justus Mayer
actors: Margaret Sullavan, Walter Connolly, Randolph Scott
plot: "So Red the Rose" is King Vidor's quietly-affecting Civil War romance starring Margaret Sullavan as a Southern aristocrat, the mistress of a Southern plantation, whose sheltered life is torn apart by the War between the States. Du...
